workflow_name: Deploy static public site to GitHub Pages

latest_pages_run.failure_summary: actions/configure-pages@v5 failed because the repository Pages site was not found/enabled for GitHub Actions.

artifact_evidence.reason: The workflow failed before actions/upload-pages-artifact@v3; artifact list total_count was 0.

blockers: GitHub Pages repository settings do not expose a Pages site configured for GitHub Actions.
No Pages artifact or deployment URL is available for the current-head run.
operator_actions: Enable GitHub Pages with Source set to GitHub Actions, or approve a workflow repair that safely handles Pages enablement.
Rerun the Pages workflow after repository Pages configuration is fixed.
Inspect the uploaded Pages artifact and deployment URL after a successful run.
notes: This evidence review is passive and did not trigger a deployment.
Local site/dist validation passed before the remote Pages configuration failure.
This audit adds no public search runtime, backend hosting, live probes, custom domain, auth, telemetry, downloads, native client, relay runtime, or production claim.
